pi_items.source: Task description explicitly asks to create a group named 'dmz-servers', and setup_task.sh ensures any pre-existing group with this name is deleted.
verifier.py states 'Actual verification is done externally via VLM evaluators' and acts as a stub, contradicting the claim of 'api_check'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the user to create an agent group exactly named 'dmz-servers' in the Wazuh dashboard. The setup script explicitly cleans up any pre-existing group with this name.
